title: Remove legacy msitools based msi installer
body:
This was replaced by the setup.exe burn installer several releases ago, and only kept around as a fallback. Remove it since it is no longer maintained and not recommended for use.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

```release-note
none
```
